title: Middleware blocks /admin access for non-admin users
description: Verify that middleware correctly restricts access to /admin routes, allowing only users with the admin role and denying or redirecting others.

steps.description: Simulate a request to /admin route as a user with student role
Verify access is denied or user is redirected
Simulate a request to /admin route as a user with admin role
Verify access is granted

title: Server actions require authentication
description: Check all server actions verify the user is authenticated before processing and reject unauthenticated requests.

steps.description: Invoke server action without authentication token
Verify that the action is rejected due to missing authentication
Invoke server action with a valid authenticated user token
Verify that the action proceeds successfully

title: Server actions enforce role-based authorization
description: Ensure server actions verify the authenticated user's role matches required permissions before proceeding.

steps.description: Invoke admin-only server action as a user with student role
Verify access is denied
Invoke admin-only server action as a user with admin role
Verify access is granted

title: Prevent IDOR by validating user resource ownership
description: Verify that server actions check that resource IDs in payloads belong to the authenticated user and reject unauthorized access.

steps.description: User A attempts to access or modify resources owned by User B via server action
Validate that the server action rejects the request due to resource ownership mismatch
User A accesses or modifies own resources
Validate successful processing

title: Supabase admin client not exposed to client-side code
description: Ensure no supabase-admin client or secrets are included or accessible in client-side JavaScript bundles.

steps.description: Build and analyze client-side code bundles
Verify absence of supabase-admin client instances or secret keys in bundles
Attempt to access supabase-admin client from browser console
Confirm client is inaccessible

title: User data responses exclude sensitive fields
description: Verify that API responses never include sensitive user data such as raw passwords, emails of other users, or internal metadata.

steps.description: Request user data via frontend API as an authenticated user
Confirm response excludes sensitive fields like raw passwords and other users' emails
Request other user data directly if possible
Validate that sensitive fields are omitted and access is denied if unauthorized

title: Login API success with valid credentials
description: Test user login success flow with valid username and password.

steps.description: Submit login form with valid username and password
Verify response status 302 Redirect to dashboard or change-password page
Verify session cookie is set correctly

title: Login API fails with invalid credentials
description: Verify login attempt with incorrect username or password is rejected.

steps.description: Submit login form with invalid password
Verify response status 200 with error message and no redirect

title: Change Password API success with valid input
description: Test first-time login password change with valid new password and confirmation.

steps.description: Post to change-password API with matching new_password and confirm_password fulfilling strength policies
Verify response status 302 redirect to home page

title: Change Password API fails with invalid input
description: Verify error responses when changing password with mismatched confirmation or weak passwords.

steps.description: Post to change-password API with mismatched new_password and confirm_password
Verify response status 200 with error message
Post to change-password API with weak/new_password that fails strength validation
Verify response status 200 with appropriate error message

title: AI Chat API success and error handling
description: Validate AI chat endpoint handles messages correctly and returns appropriate errors for missing input or failures.

steps.description: Send a valid message payload to AI Chat API
Verify response status 200 with AI response content
Send request to AI Chat API without message field
Verify response status 400 with missing message error
Simulate AI API key error and send message
Verify response status 500 reporting API key issues
Simulate service unavailable and send message
Verify response status 503 reporting service unavailable

title: Courses API returns courses by semester
description: Test fetching a list of courses filtered by semester parameter with normal and error scenarios.

steps.description: Send GET request to /api/courses with valid semester query parameter
Verify response status 200 with array of courses belonging to the semester
Send GET request to /api/courses with missing or invalid semester parameter
Verify reasonable handling, e.g. default to all courses or error response
Simulate internal server error scenario
Validate response status 500

title: Progress Tracking API marks content as completed
description: Validate marking lessons or quizzes as completed succeeds and handles repeated completions correctly.

steps.description: Post valid completion data (contentId, contentType, xp) to markContentAsCompleted API
Verify response status 200 with success confirmation
Repeat completion request for the same content
Verify response status 200 indicating already completed

title: Progress Tracking API submits quiz result and awards XP
description: Test submitting quiz scores for XP calculation and verify correct awarding.

steps.description: Post quizId and scorePercentage to submitQuizResult API
Verify response status 200 with correct XP awarded

title: Onboarding API completes user onboarding with GPA input
description: Validate completing onboarding accepts GPA input and responds with success.

steps.description: Post valid gpaTerm1 value to completeOnboarding API
Verify response status 200 confirming onboarding completion

title: Unauthorized user cannot complete onboarding for others
description: Ensure that a user cannot submit onboarding data for another user.

steps.description: Attempt to complete onboarding with a user context different from the authenticated user
Verify that the request is rejected due to authorization failure
